hero.eyebrow: Medical Sales · Goldman Sachs Alum · Licensed EMT · DFW
hero.name: Kelsey
hero.tagline: Built across missions, boardrooms, and trauma bays.

narrative.title: How do you just make things happen?
narrative.body:
People have asked me my whole life how I just make things happen. I never had a good answer until recently.

As a Spanish speaking missionary across three states, I inherited the territory everyone before me had written off. I built it into our most productive account through one relationship that unlocked everything. A corporate career that took me from Vivint Solar, where I identified a $2M opportunity and sold it to senior leadership, to Goldman Sachs, where my hiring manager called my interview one of the best he had ever seen. Most recently, finishing my EMT program in the top 5% of my class and finding myself in emergency rooms and trauma bays executing under pressure alongside physicians.

Different rooms. Same instinct. Read the person. Understand what they need. Earn their trust. Find a way to close the gap. That is what I have been doing my entire life. In medical sales it just finally has a name.

recommendations.label: Stryker
recommendations.name: Brock Frazer
recommendations.title: Marketing Manager, Stryker
recommendations.text: She brings the kind of drive, curiosity, and relationship-building mindset that translates to medical sales success.

recommendations.label: Stryker
recommendations.name: Spencer Curtis
recommendations.title: Product Manager, NPD, Stryker
recommendations.text: Kelsey has a unique drive, customer-first mindset and attention to detail that differentiates her from other candidates. She would perform with utmost accountability, integrity, and customer-centric mindset.

recommendations.label: EMT Instructor
recommendations.name: Aditya Kanakasabapathy
recommendations.title: EMT Instructor, University of Texas at Dallas
recommendations.text: She is capable of having a conversation about medical products with the relevant professionals on a really intelligent level, viewed through the patient care and clinical realities lens, which will facilitate her making a true connection with healthcare professionals.

recommendations.label: iRhythm
recommendations.name: Justin Atchison
recommendations.title: Territory Manager, iRhythm Technologies
recommendations.text: I was immediately impressed by her communication skills, her genuine curiosity about the industry, and her potential as a sales professional. She asked thoughtful questions about the clinical side and showed real interest in how it impacts physicians and patients.

experience.title: Emergency Medical Technician — Clinical Rotations
experience.body: Top 7% of class. Hands-on clinical experience across emergency, surgical, and in-transit care environments.
bullets: Assisted an ER physician during an emergency tracheotomy under extreme pressure
Maintained strict sterile and regulatory compliance during in-transit care
Stabilized a patient during transfer from an air ambulance to the ER during an active medical emergency
Facilitated patient handoffs with ER physicians, nurses, and trauma teams

experience.title: Global Markets Analyst
experience.body: Managed 20+ institutional client relationships across multi-million dollar syndicated loan portfolios.
bullets: Operated in a 70+ hour-per-week environment, delivering 10–20 complex deals weekly with zero-defect execution
Served as the trusted point of contact for senior decision-makers during high-stakes escalations
Developed deep product expertise through legal contract research, enabling resolution of complex client issues

experience.title: Business Operations Analyst
experience.body: Identified and sized a $2M+ opportunity, built and sold the business case to senior leadership.
bullets: Diagnosed territory and operational gaps tied directly to P&L impact
Built forecasts in SQL, Snowflake, and Python aligned to board-level targets

experience.title: Executive Director (Volunteer) — BYU Chapter
experience.body: As Executive Director of the BYU CASA chapter, led a 5-person leadership team overseeing 100+ volunteer advocates supporting court-involved children.

experience.title: Spanish-Speaking Representative — Nebraska, Iowa & South Dakota
experience.body: Managed a Spanish-speaking territory across 3 states. Built and maintained a pipeline tracking system increasing referral growth and reducing cold prospecting. Onboarded and trained an incoming representative while maintaining performance targets.
